name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil on a crispy crust.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Loaded with spicy pepperoni, mozzarella, and tangy tomato sauce.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, onions, and bell peppers.

name: Classic Veg Burger
description: Crispy veggie patty with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and our special sauce.

name: Chicken Zinger Burger
description: Crispy spiced chicken fillet, coleslaw, and chipotle mayo in a brioche bun.

name: Double Beef Smash Burger
description: Double smashed beef patties, American cheese, pickles, and secret sauce.

name: Creamy Alfredo Pasta
description: Fettuccine in rich cream sauce with parmesan and a hint of garlic.

name: Chicken Arrabbiata
description: Penne in spicy tomato sauce with grilled chicken and fresh herbs.

name: Pesto Veggie Pasta
description: Fusilli tossed in homemade basil pesto with cherry tomatoes and olives.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: Refreshing lime juice with sparkling water, sugar, and a pinch of salt.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Thick creamy yogurt blended with Alphonso mango pulp and cardamom.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Chilled espresso blended with milk, ice cream, and a drizzle of chocolate.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a gooey molten centre, served with vanilla ice cream.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Classic baked cheesecake with a buttery graham cracker crust and berry compote.

name: Tiramisu
description: Italian classic with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and cocoa.

name: Paneer Tikka Pizza
description: Indian-Italian fusion with spiced paneer, capsicum, onion, and tandoori sauce.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
description: Fresh strawberries blended with milk and ice cream, topped with whipped cream.
